rationale: Section 25.025 governs confidentiality of home address information in appraisal records for certain protected individuals. It does not address or depend on the homestead exemption amount in Section 11.13(b), so no conflict arises.
quote: Sec. 25.025. CONFIDENTIALITY OF CERTAIN HOME ADDRESS INFORMATION.
_note: Rule text concerns address confidentiality only; no operative link to exemption dollar amounts in §11.13(b).
